note: Extracted by the AI parser from verified parenting sources. Deals change; the app shows a Verify button so a local parent can confirm in person.

deals.name: Moe's Southwest Grill
deals.deal: Kids eat free with an adult meal, all day
deals.note: Available at most Nassau/Suffolk Moe's. Dine-in.

deals.name: American Beauty Bistro
deals.deal: Kids free with an adult entree, 4pm to 9pm

deals.name: Tap Room
deals.deal: Family Night: kids 12 and under free with a $15+ food item, all day
deals.note: Limit two kids per table. Kids menu comes with crayons.

deals.name: Miller's Ale House
deals.deal: Kids eat free with a $10 purchase
deals.note: Limit two kids per adult. Ages vary.

deals.name: Your Mother's House Kitchen & Bar
deals.deal: Kids under 10 free with an adult entree
deals.note: Kids menu: grilled cheese, corn dogs, mac and cheese, tenders.

deals.name: Smashburger
deals.deal: Kids 12 and under free with an adult meal, all day
deals.note: Dine-in only. Call your local Smashburger to confirm participation.

deals.name: Rath Park
deals.deal: Playground, wading pool and sports fields
deals.note: Town of Hempstead park. Wading pool and programs run seasonally. District residency may apply.

deals.name: Kids Bowl Free
deals.deal: 2 free bowling games every day, all summer
deals.note: Sign up once at kidsbowlfree.com. Most centers Mon-Sat, ~May to Sept. Ages vary (often up to 15). Shoe rental not included.
